name: prototyper
description: User stories as structured MCP context for Claude Code. Write your stories in Prototyper, let Claude Code implement them to acceptance criteria — one story at a time.
author: Jony Bursztyn

requiredEnvVars.name: PROTOTYPER_API_KEY
requiredEnvVars.description: Your Prototyper API key. Get it from your account settings in the Prototyper app.

requiredEnvVars.name: PROTOTYPER_PROJECT_ID
requiredEnvVars.description: Your Prototyper project ID. Find it in the URL when you open a project in the Prototyper app.

steps: 1. Get your API key from Prototyper account settings
2. Copy your project ID from the Prototyper app URL
3. Set PROTOTYPER_API_KEY and PROTOTYPER_PROJECT_ID environment variables
4. Run /prototyper:sync to pull your open stories into the session
